headline: REPORTS THAT DRIVE REAL CHANGE
subheading: Write GMP audit findings that withstand MHRA scrutiny and close for good.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial composition evoking a pharmaceutical GMP audit report that drives change: a clean translucent document surface floating in deep navy space, its rows of findings rendered as glowing teal and cyan bars sorted into three ascending risk tiers, the highest tier marked by a single fresh-green status indicator. A precise magnifying lens of cyan glass hovers over one row, refracting light to suggest scrutiny and evidence. Faint blurred geometry of a sterile stainless-steel cleanroom door and an illuminated status light glow in the background, conveying a regulated GMP facility. Delicate connective lines trace a path from a flagged finding to a closing checkmark loop, hinting at corrective action and closure. Layered glass panels, soft volumetric light raking from the left, shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, clinical-luxury atmosphere of precision, trust and accountability. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
